title: Lummy's: Biomes n' Nature
description: a Mod that Adds Majestic Biomes & Moody Spaces
body:
# **Lummy's**: _Biomes n' Nature_
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/271db5993f4303e10ca906948c5396e914b71d80.png)

---

# This mod adds a variety of:
**_Majestic Biomes_**

**_Different Plants_**

**_Amazing Structures_**

**_Gorgeos Flowers_**

**_Special Trees_**

**_Colorful Wood Types_**

---

![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fc9a1f14745151dc79a47dbb940deae7112cdd5.png)

## [Join My Discord Server for any suggestion or Mod idea](https://discord.gg/wunVBu3V4q)


**MORE COMING VERY SOON:**
With custom structures and mansions and wild mobs (also more including Lummy's: World's Additions mod i made). Having Several Biomes and Mobs and plants and even structures to explore

---

AND MORE COMING SOON (as this project is in beta stage)...
